Your GLP-1 f*cked your hair. Not the weight loss. Not the diet. The medication itself. Here's what's actually happening. When you lose fat that fast on Ozempic, Wegovy, or Mounjaro, you lose the estrogen that was stored in that fat. And when estrogen drops, DHT, a hormone that's been in your body your whole life, suddenly has direct access to your hair follicles. It starts shrinking them. Slowly.

You're trying everything to make your acne scars disappear. Vitamin C. Retinol. Peels. Microneedling pens. But most treatments fail for one simple reason. Acne scars don’t live on the surface. They form deep in the dermis, about 1.5mm below your skin, where collagen was destroyed during inflammation.

Ice pick acne scars are one of the hardest scars to fade. Those small, deep holes in your skin… They don’t go away with creams or serums. Because they’re not surface-level. They’re caused by collagen loss deep underneath your skin. That’s why retinol, vitamin C, and most treatments barely make a difference. They simply can’t reach deep enough.
